transport.tls.present.label: TLS/HTTPS enabled
transport.tls.present.notes: True if site responds on HTTPS without redirect errors

transport.http.status_code.label: HTTP response status code
transport.http.status_code.notes: Status code of the final HTTP response after redirects

transport.http.latency_ms.label: HTTP response latency in milliseconds
transport.http.latency_ms.notes: Time to first byte in ms

privacy.consent.banner.present.label: Cookie/consent banner detected
privacy.consent.banner.present.notes: Deprecated — use privacy.consent.quality (5-level enum) for observatory-grade scoring.

privacy.consent.quality.label: Cookie consent quality (5-level enum)
privacy.consent.quality.notes: Values: none | informational_only | accept_only | reject_equal_prominence | granular_with_revoke

privacy.consent.granular.label: Granular consent options available
privacy.consent.granular.notes: True if user can selectively accept/reject cookie categories

analytics.tracking.google_analytics.pres.label: Google Analytics detected
analytics.tracking.google_analytics.pres.notes: True if GA tracking code is detected in HTML

analytics.tracking.cookieless.present.label: Cookieless tracking detected
analytics.tracking.cookieless.present.notes: True if a cookieless analytics solution is detected

analytics.tracking.cookie_based.present.label: Cookie-based tracking detected
analytics.tracking.cookie_based.present.notes: True if cookie-based tracking is detected
